final:
module top_module(input0, input1, select, out);input [31:0] input0, input1;   
  input select;              	 
  output reg [31:0] out;         
  

  

  always @ (select or input0 or input1)
  begin
    case(select)
      
      1'b0: begin
        
        out <= input0;
      end
      
      1'b1: begin
        
        out <= input1;
      end
    endcase
  end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      out <= ~input0;
      out <= ~input1;
    end
  end

endmodule
